productDisplayName: Nike Women As Make Yours Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black crew neck t-shirt, made of 62% cotton, 34% polyester and 4% spandex, has short sleeves, rib crew-neck with interior taping for comfort and screen print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean This nike "Make Yourself" women's t-shirt sends out an inspiring message in a pop of color, while its sweat-wicking stretch fabric keeps you comfortable all day.
